从小父母双亡的孤儿路明飞步入了他的高中生涯，可等待他的校园生活是什么？
黑暗，孤独，恐惧？
被班级辣妹霸凌？不存在的，下一秒辣妹就痛苦倒在地上。
被天使青梅竹马厌恶辱骂？不存在的，路明飞下一秒就将她的头捏在手上。
给转学美少女当舔狗？不存在的，路明飞只想让她还钱
可是，路明飞却感觉越来越奇怪
这些诡异的女人怎么跟年糕一样的
越打越粘人了？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e6365f4e991fa2db5b60ad675a02a33e","author":"魇君一邪","author_id":"","book_id":"7541609581525339161","book_name":"女主全神人？用拳头让她们清醒","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"11.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":858,"name":"轻小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=858&name=轻小说&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7541610048980517401","read_count":"112661","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"267964"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.0","serial_count":"111","tags":"动漫衍生,二次元,综漫,同人,轻小说,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e6a528bc48806f947e8f4c361f0ff39b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779288064&x-signature=XUPIw9HMFZF%2F7ovaM1RbNfK3MSU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2341308191736032","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"28"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321224104B28897C8140E8C24730E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3677,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":16137},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1770393627,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7604904790453994302","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看好看，一个充满了病态角色的世界，冷漠且武力值爆表的主角在与病态角色和金钱利益相关的状态纠缠下与其他人物有了冲突，主角终究无法独善其身，卷入了一桩桩麻烦事件。主角感觉有一点点《实教》主角的影子。然后就是有些女主对主角十分厌恶，主角也是面对那些女主一点都不心慈手软也是很爽啊。总结差不多就是其他人全都有病但主角也不正常但很厉害（武力应该天花板级别的）因为某些原因所以要争取、保卫自己的利益。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770659581,"group_id":"7541609581525339161","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"。。。。。。。。。。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2ZBSa1DxfDu8D18w9lh8xnQ1uZuRPogR85AUBQBAsxg","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e0dd3395938a48cd8655b574cde40bdd~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776622335&x-signature=BfPpbMTwr5FX2v%2FJQEz6irAoock%3D","user_id":"2163489336995453","user_name":"夏飽"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2163489336995453","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7541609581525339161","book_info":{"abstract":"【路人男主】+【不舔】+【极致冷漠】+【另类极致爽点】+【校园日常】+【轻小说风格】+【后续修罗场】+【超神级脑洞】（本作所有同人角色均为在原人物基础上二创修改）
